rationale.P01: Real KubeNodePressure: DiskPressure=True on node ip-10-0-3-21.us-east-1.compute.internal, never auto-resolved, pat-diskpressure-evict is a surging negative pattern with active pod-eviction risk for play-svc. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P21: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-diskpressure-evict root): kube-state-metrics scrape failures on the same pressured node. Collapse into the eviction incident; do not page separately.
